mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{followId} AND is_cancel = 0
SELECT follower_id FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_cancel = 0
SELECT user_id FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND is_cancel = 0

SELECT uf.follower_id AS id, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.last_login_time) * 1000 AS loginTime FROM user_follow uf JOIN user u ON uf.user_id = u.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{followId} AND u.last_login_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY u.last_login_time DESC LIMIT #{activeCount}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE (user_id, follower_id) IN
(#{item.userId}, #{item.followerId})
